code:
import string
import list
import io

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, -cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn emit(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> Unit
  mut i = 0
  let n = a.len()
  while i < n
    let x = match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let y = match b.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let s = x + y
    println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    emit(parse_ints(l1), parse_ints(l2))
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
